name: Control Spire Fragment

cost.special: Loot only — found near destroyed Control Spires

effect: Once per encounter as a Basic Action, place this fragment within 2 spaces. Until the start of your next turn all Digimon within 3 spaces of the fragment — ally and enemy alike — cannot digivolve or dedigivolve. The fragment crumbles after use.
notes: Single use. Affects allies and enemies. Lasts until start of your next turn.
